claim: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: Completed read-only audit of DinoBrain durable source/provenance/source-chunk-claim lineage and graph health. Findings: graph health is correctly degraded but reports all accepted instances as missing source mapping; current source/provenance records exist for RAG guidance, but accepted-memory lineage recognition only checks narrow single-source fields and misses source_paths/source_chunk_path/claim_paths/provenance records. The graph index currently models record/root/folder/tag/kind/wikilink edges, not the provenance/lifecycle/quarantine/usage edges required by the completion contract. Node/npm were unavailable in the shell, so verification was static plus direct file inspection rather than npm verifier execution.
